title: andryala varia var. crithmifolia
intro:
Andryala varia var. crithmifolia, commonly known as a plant species within the Asteraceae family, is also referred to as mountain centaury. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Therapeutically, it is believed to exhibit actions such as wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and the ability to modulate the immune system. Bioactive constituents of Andryala varia var. crithmifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
